message:
feat(random): add SeedSequence, SeedMaterial, and default_rng constructor API

Implement NumPy-compatible SeedSequence with deterministic state generation,
monotonic spawn lineage, and configurable pool sizes. Add SeedMaterial enum
for flexible RNG construction (None, U64, U32Words, State replay). Include
RNG core reason code registry, RngConstructorError/SeedSequenceError types
with reason_code() mappings, and generator_from_seed_sequence bridge.
Comprehensive tests cover determinism, spawn contract violations, state
replay, and reason code registry consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
